content: Chaoli Tan is currently a Cybersecurity student at New York Institute of Technology - Vancouver campus. In NYIT, Chaoli studied a lot of Data Structures and Algorithms. He also did many security labs from Seed Labs. Chaoli is interested in Computer Science since he was a little child. He decided and began to grasp the interest in Computer Science even though he has been a RF Engineer for 5 years. After graduate, he would like to work as a Software Develop Engineer.
summary: Chaoli Tan is currently a Cybersecurity student at New York Institute of Technology - Vancouver campus. In NYIT, Chaoli studied a lot of Data Structures and Algorithms. He also did many security labs from Seed Labs.
title: Chaoli Tan
